name: Premium 42-Seater Luxury Coach
description: Our flagship Volvo multi-axle luxury coach offers unmatched ride comfort with semi-sleeper seats, advanced air suspension, and premium passenger amenities. Ideal for long-distance group tours and corporate travel.

name: Deluxe 32-Seater Tour Bus
description: Perfectly sized for medium groups, this deluxe coach blends agility with luxury. Features custom push-back seats, individually controlled AC vents, and a high-fidelity sound system for an engaging travel experience.

name: Executive 25-Seater Mini Bus
description: An executive-class mini bus designed for corporate team outings, weddings, and airport transfers. Offers ample head and legroom, premium upholstery, and a quiet cabin environment.

name: Luxury 17-Seater Traveller
description: A spacious and high-roof traveller custom-configured with plush seating. Highly popular for family vacation trips, offering great fuel efficiency and maneuvering in hill stations.

name: Premium 12-Seater Traveller
description: A customized luxury traveller featuring 1x1 captain chairs, rich leatherette interior trim, ambient roof lighting, and personal entertainment monitors. Experience ultimate comfort in smaller groups.
